title: Live AI Q&A + Crushing it in Chess at the Same Time - Come Hang Out!
summary: Cole Medin is hosting a live AI Q&A stream on Saturday where viewers can ask questions about AI coding, agents, Claude Code, and Archon. The session doubles as a casual chess-playing hangout with weekly uploads on Wednesday.
writeup: Cole Medin hosts a live Saturday Q&A on AI coding, agents, Claude Code, and Archon, taking viewer questions while playing chess.
